final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit register instead of an 8-bit register.
module reg8bit (
    input [7:0] data,
    input clk,
    input load,
    output reg [7:0] q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit register instead of an 8-bit register.
